item.title: IELTS skill
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="使用" class="heading-element"><span>使用</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>Skill</th>
 <th>干啥</th>
 <th>触发词</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><code>/ielts</code></td>
 <td>路由入口 + 摸底 + 给建议</td>
 <td>「我要备考雅思」「IELTS」</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><code>/ielts-writing</code></td>
 <td>写作四维批改 + 改写对比 + 审题</td>
 <td>「批改作文」「帮我看看这篇」</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><code>/ielts-reading</code></td>
 <td>同义替换提取 + T/F/NG 拆解 + 错题诊断</td>
 <td>「分析阅读」「这道为什么错」</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><code>/ielts-speaking</code></td>
 <td>5 个万能故事覆盖 80% Part 2 话题</td>
 <td>「口语素材」「Part 2 准备」</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>

item.title: LLM · RAG常见数据集
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="常见数据集" class="heading-element"><span>常见数据集</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b8%b8%e8%a7%81%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e9%9b%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="经典-open-domain-qa--rag-原始论文常用" class="heading-element"><span>经典 Open-Domain QA / RAG 原始论文常用</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%b8-open-domain-qa--rag-%e5%8e%9f%e5%a7%8b%e8%ae%ba%e6%96%87%e5%b8%b8%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>数据集</th>
 <th>主要用途</th>
 <th>简介与特点</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>Natural Questions, NQ</strong></td>
 <td>开放域 QA、检索器训练、RAG 端到端评测</td>
 <td>Google 真实搜索问题 + Wikipedia 页面标注，含 long answer / short answer。NQ 是 DPR、REALM、RAG 等论文的核心基准之一。原始数据约 307k train、7.8k dev、7.8k hidden test。适合测“能不能从大规模 Wikipedia 找到证据并回答”。来源：<a href="https://github.com/google-research-datasets/natural-questions"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Google NQ</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>TriviaQA</strong></td>
 <td>开放域 QA、检索增强问答</td>
 <td>约 95k trivia 问答，超过 650k question-answer-evidence triples；问题更复杂，答案和证据句常有较大词面差异。常用于训练/评估 dense retriever 和 RAG。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1705.03551"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">TriviaQA paper</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>WebQuestions</strong></td>
 <td>短答案 factoid QA</td>
 <td>基于 Freebase 的自然语言问题，规模小但历史上很常用；RAG 原始论文用它评估 open-domain QA。缺点是 Freebase 过时、规模小，今天更多作为经典对照。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>CuratedTREC / TREC QA</strong></td>
 <td>小规模事实问答</td>
 <td>常见于 DrQA、DPR、RAG 早期论文，问题多为简短 factoid。优点是历史可比性强；缺点是规模小、容易受模型记忆影响。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>SQuAD / SQuAD-Open</strong></td>
 <td>阅读理解转开放域检索 QA</td>
 <td>SQuAD 原本是给定段落抽取答案，约 100k+ Wikipedia 问题；SQuAD-Open 会把上下文移除，要求系统先检索再回答。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1606.05250"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">SQuAD</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>MS MARCO</strong></td>
 <td>passage retrieval、reranking、abstractive QA</td>
 <td>来自 Bing 查询日志，约 1M 问题、8.8M passage。RAG 论文常用它测“真实搜索式问题 + 生成式答案”。也是训练检索器、reranker 的核心工业级数据。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1611.09268"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">MS MARCO</a></td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="多跳推理--信息整合类-rag" class="heading-element"><span>多跳推理 / 信息整合类 RAG</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%b3%e6%8e%a8%e7%90%86--%e4%bf%a1%e6%81%af%e6%95%b4%e5%90%88%e7%b1%bb-rag" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>数据集</th>
 <th>主要用途</th>
 <th>简介与特点</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>HotpotQA</strong></td>
 <td>multi-hop QA、supporting facts 检索</td>
 <td>113k Wikipedia 多跳问答，要求跨多个文档推理，并标注 sentence-level supporting facts。RAG 里常用来测“检索多篇证据 + 合成答案”。有 distractor 和 fullwiki 两种设定。来源：<a href="https://hotpotqa.github.io/"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">HotpotQA</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>2WikiMultiHopQA</strong></td>
 <td>多跳推理、路径解释</td>
 <td>基于 Wikidata + Wikipedia 构造，强调 reasoning path，常用于测 query decomposition、多跳检索、graph/RAG。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2011.01060"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">2WikiMultiHopQA</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>MuSiQue</strong></td>
 <td>更难的 2-4 hop QA</td>
 <td>25k 多跳问题，专门减少 shortcut，使单跳模型难以投机。适合测复杂 RAG pipeline 的分解、迭代检索、证据组合。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2108.00573"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">MuSiQue</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>StrategyQA</strong></td>
 <td>隐式多跳推理</td>
 <td>2,780 个 yes/no 问题，推理步骤不会直接写在问题中，并提供 decomposition 和 Wikipedia evidence。适合测 RAG 是否会规划检索策略。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2101.02235"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">StrategyQA</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>QAMPARI</strong></td>
 <td>多答案聚合 QA</td>
 <td>问题答案是实体列表，分散在多个段落中；适合测 RAG 的 broad retrieval、coverage、去重和答案聚合能力。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.12665"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">QAMPARI</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>ASQA</strong></td>
 <td>歧义问题 + 长答案综合</td>
 <td>面向 ambiguous questions，要求生成能覆盖多种解释的长答案。常被 citation/RAG 论文用来测综合能力和可验证性。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2204.06092"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">ASQA</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>ELI5</strong></td>
 <td>长答案生成</td>
 <td>Reddit “Explain Like I’m Five” 约 270k threads，答案长、开放、解释型；RAG 论文用来测 long-form generation 与证据支持。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1907.09190"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">ELI5</a></td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="检索基准--retriever-评测" class="heading-element"><span>检索基准 / Retriever 评测</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e7%b4%a2%e5%9f%ba%e5%87%86--retriever-%e8%af%84%e6%b5%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>数据集 / Benchmark</th>
 <th>主要用途</th>
 <th>简介与特点</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>BEIR</strong></td>
 <td>zero-shot retrieval 统一评测</td>
 <td>RAG 论文常先测 retriever，再测 generator。BEIR 集成 MS MARCO、NQ、HotpotQA、FiQA、TREC-COVID、NFCorpus、ArguAna、Touché、CQADupStack、Quora、DBPedia、SCIDOCS、FEVER、Climate-FEVER、SciFact 等，覆盖新闻、科学、金融、医疗、论坛、事实核查。指标常用 nDCG@k、Recall@k、MRR、MAP。来源：<a href="https://github.com/beir-cellar/beir"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">BEIR</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>KILT</strong></td>
 <td>统一 knowledge-intensive NLP + provenance</td>
 <td>把 FEVER、AIDA、T-REx、zsRE、NQ、HotpotQA、TriviaQA、ELI5、Wizard of Wikipedia 等任务统一到同一个 Wikipedia knowledge source 和 evidence/provenance 格式。非常适合端到端 RAG、可溯源生成。来源：<a href="https://github.com/facebookresearch/KILT"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">KILT</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>MIRACL / MIRAGE-Bench</strong></td>
 <td>多语言检索与多语言 RAG</td>
 <td>MIRACL 常用于多语言 dense retrieval；MIRAGE-Bench 在此基础上做 multilingual RAG arena-style 评测。适合中文/多语言 RAG。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.13716"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">MIRAGE-Bench</a></td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="事实核查可归因幻觉检测" class="heading-element"><span>事实核查、可归因、幻觉检测</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8b%e5%ae%9e%e6%a0%b8%e6%9f%a5%e5%8f%af%e5%bd%92%e5%9b%a0%e5%b9%bb%e8%a7%89%e6%a3%80%e6%b5%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>数据集</th>
 <th>主要用途</th>
 <th>简介与特点</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>FEVER</strong></td>
 <td>fact verification + evidence retrieval</td>
 <td>185,445 条 Wikipedia claims，标签为 supported/refuted/not enough info，并标注证据句。RAG 原始论文也用 FEVER 测分类式 retrieval-augmented generation。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.05355"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">FEVER</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>SciFact</strong></td>
 <td>科学事实核查</td>
 <td>科学 claim + paper abstract evidence，常在 BEIR/RAG 评测中用于 scientific RAG。规模小但证据要求高。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>Climate-FEVER</strong></td>
 <td>气候事实核查</td>
 <td>气候相关 claims + evidence，常用于检索鲁棒性、争议性事实、领域 RAG。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>ALCE</strong></td>
 <td>带引用生成评测</td>
 <td>Automatic LLMs’ Citation Evaluation，要求系统检索证据并生成带 citation 的答案；常用 ASQA、QAMPARI、ELI5。评估 fluency、correctness、citation quality。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.14627"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">ALCE</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>HAGRID</strong></td>
 <td>attributed generative search</td>
 <td>面向生成式信息检索，要求生成解释并给出可归因引用；基于 MIRACL English 构建。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.16883"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">HAGRID</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>RAGTruth</strong></td>
 <td>RAG 幻觉标注</td>
 <td>约 18k RAG 生成回答，带 case-level 和 word-level hallucination annotation；适合训练/评估 hallucination detector。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.00396"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">RAGTruth</a></td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="专门为-rag-设计的新-benchmark" class="heading-element"><span>专门为 RAG 设计的新 benchmark</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%93%e9%97%a8%e4%b8%ba-rag-%e8%ae%be%e8%ae%a1%e7%9a%84%e6%96%b0-benchmark" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>数据集</th>
 <th>主要用途</th>
 <th>简介与特点</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>RGB</strong></td>
 <td>RAG 基础能力诊断</td>
 <td>中英双语，测试 noise robustness、negative rejection、information integration、counterfactual robustness。很适合分析“检索到噪声/错误证据时 LLM 会不会被带偏”。来源：<a href="https://github.com/chen700564/RGB"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">RGB</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>CRAG</strong></td>
 <td>真实动态 QA + API/RAG</td>
 <td>Comprehensive RAG Benchmark，4,409 个 factual QA，含 mock web / KG APIs，覆盖 5 个领域、8 类问题、实体流行度和时间动态性。KDD Cup 2024 相关，适合测现代 agentic/web RAG。来源：<a href="https://github.com/facebookresearch/CRAG"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">CRAG</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td><strong>RAGBench</strong></td>
 <td>工业 RAG 质量评测</td>
 <td>100k examples，覆盖多个行业语料和 RAG 任务，带可解释标签，用于评估 retrieval relevance、answer faithfulness、context utilization 等。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.11005"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">RAGBench</a></td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="垂直领域常见数据集" class="heading-element"><span>垂直领域常见数据集</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9e%82%e7%9b%b4%e9%a2%86%e5%9f%9f%e5%b8%b8%e8%a7%81%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e9%9b%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>领域</th>
 <th>常见数据集</th>
 <th>用法</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>科学论文 RAG</td>
 <td><strong>QASPER、SciFact、SCIDOCS、LitQA</strong></td>
 <td>QASPER 是 NLP paper full-text QA，约 5,049 questions / 1,585 papers；适合论文问答、证据定位、长文档 RAG。来源：<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.03011"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">QASPER</a></td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>医疗 / 生物</td>
 <td><strong>BioASQ、PubMedQA、TREC-COVID、NFCorpus</strong></td>
 <td>用于 biomedical retrieval、medical QA、COVID 文献检索。BEIR 中也包含 BioASQ、TREC-COVID、NFCorpus。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>金融</td>
 <td><strong>FiQA</strong></td>
 <td>金融问答/意见检索，常用于 BEIR 检索泛化和金融 RAG。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>对话式知识</td>
 <td><strong>Wizard of Wikipedia、Doc2Dial / MultiDoc2Dial</strong></td>
 <td>测知识型对话、对话状态下的检索与回答。KILT 收录 Wizard of Wikipedia。</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="数据集的选择" class="heading-element"><span>数据集的选择</span>
 <a href="#%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e9%9b%86%e7%9a%84%e9%80%89%e6%8b%a9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>测 retriever：<code>BEIR + MS MARCO + NQ/HotpotQA</code></li>
<li>测端到端 QA：<code>NQ + TriviaQA + HotpotQA + WebQuestions/CuratedTREC</code></li>
<li>测多跳/综合：<code>HotpotQA + MuSiQue + 2WikiMultiHopQA + QAMPARI + ASQA</code></li>
<li>测引用/可验证性：<code>ALCE + ASQA + QAMPARI + ELI5 + HAGRID</code></li>
<li>测幻觉/鲁棒性：<code>RGB + CRAG + RAGTruth + FEVER/SciFact</code></li>
<li>做中文或多语言 RAG：优先看 <code>RGB、MIRACL/MIRAGE-Bench</code>，再补中文问答/领域私有数据。</li>
</ul>

item.title: LLM · 评价指标
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="评价指标" class="heading-element"><span>评价指标</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%84%e4%bb%b7%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="常用" class="heading-element"><span>常用</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b8%b8%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>分类、选择题：Accuracy</li>
<li>短答案问答：EM / F1</li>
<li>摘要：ROUGE + Faithfulness</li>
<li>翻译：BLEU / COMET</li>
<li>RAG：Recall@k + Faithfulness + Answer Relevancy</li>
<li>代码：pass@k / Test Pass Rate</li>
<li>对话模型：Win Rate / Human Preference</li>
<li>安全模型：Refusal Accuracy / Jailbreak ASR / Toxicity</li>
<li>部署系统：Latency / Throughput / Cost</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="通用正确性指标" class="heading-element"><span>通用正确性指标</span>
 <a href="#%e9%80%9a%e7%94%a8%e6%ad%a3%e7%a1%ae%e6%80%a7%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Accuracy</td>
 <td>准确率，答对样本数 / 总样本数</td>
 <td>选择题、分类、判断题、数学题最终答案</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Exact Match, EM</td>
 <td>模型答案和标准答案完全一致才算对</td>
 <td>开放域问答、抽取式问答、短答案任务</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Precision</td>
 <td>模型给出的内容中，有多少是正确的</td>
 <td>信息抽取、检索、实体识别</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Recall</td>
 <td>标准答案中，有多少被模型覆盖到了</td>
 <td>检索、召回、长答案覆盖度</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>F1</td>
 <td>Precision 和 Recall 的调和平均</td>
 <td>问答、信息抽取、开放域 QA</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>F1 = 2 * Precision * Recall / (Precision + Recall)</p>
<p>在不同问答数据集上，用 F1 衡量模型答案和标准答案的词级/token 级重合程度。</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id="语言建模指标" class="heading-element"><span>语言建模指标</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e5%bb%ba%e6%a8%a1%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Loss</td>
 <td>模型预测下一个 token 的平均损失</td>
 <td>训练过程、预训练模型评估</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Perplexity, PPL</td>
 <td>困惑度，衡量模型对文本的预测能力，越低越好</td>
 <td>语言模型预训练、续写能力、文本建模</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="问答任务指标" class="heading-element"><span>问答任务指标</span>
 <a href="#%e9%97%ae%e7%ad%94%e4%bb%bb%e5%8a%a1%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>EM</td>
 <td>答案完全匹配</td>
 <td>短答案 QA，比如 Natural Questions</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Token F1</td>
 <td>答案和标准答案的词级重合程度</td>
 <td>开放域 QA、阅读理解</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Answer Accuracy</td>
 <td>最终答案是否正确</td>
 <td>数学题、知识问答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Supporting Fact F1</td>
 <td>支撑证据是否找对</td>
 <td>HotpotQA、多跳问答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Hit@k</td>
 <td>前 k 个候选里是否包含正确答案</td>
 <td>检索式问答、RAG</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>常见数据集：</p>
<ul>
<li>NQ：Natural Questions，开放域自然问题</li>
<li>TriviaQA / TQA：百科类事实问答</li>
<li>HotpotQA / HQA：多跳推理问答</li>
<li>WebQSP：知识库问答</li>
</ul>
<p>如果是普通 QA，看 EM/F1；如果是多跳 QA，还要看证据是否正确。</p>
<h3 id="文本生成指标" class="heading-element"><span>文本生成指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%96%87%e6%9c%ac%e7%94%9f%e6%88%90%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>BLEU</td>
 <td>n-gram 精确率，生成文本和参考文本的短语重合</td>
 <td>机器翻译</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>ROUGE</td>
 <td>n-gram 召回率，生成文本覆盖参考文本多少内容</td>
 <td>摘要任务</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>METEOR</td>
 <td>考虑词形变化、同义词，比 BLEU 更柔和</td>
 <td>翻译、摘要</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>BERTScore</td>
 <td>用语义 embedding 比较生成文本和参考文本</td>
 <td>摘要、开放式生成</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>chrF</td>
 <td>基于字符 n-gram 的相似度</td>
 <td>翻译，尤其适合形态变化丰富语言</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>这些指标大多依赖“参考答案”。问题是：LLM 的好回答可能有很多种表达方式，所以纯文本重合指标有局限。</p>
<p>所以开放式生成现在经常结合人工评价或 LLM-as-Judge。</p>
<h3 id="摘要任务指标" class="heading-element"><span>摘要任务指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%91%98%e8%a6%81%e4%bb%bb%e5%8a%a1%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>ROUGE-1</td>
 <td>单词级重合</td>
 <td>摘要内容覆盖</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>ROUGE-2</td>
 <td>双词短语重合</td>
 <td>摘要流畅度和局部表达</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>ROUGE-L</td>
 <td>最长公共子序列</td>
 <td>摘要整体结构相似度</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Faithfulness</td>
 <td>摘要是否忠实原文</td>
 <td>新闻摘要、论文摘要</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Factual Consistency</td>
 <td>是否存在事实错误</td>
 <td>高可信摘要场景</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>摘要不能只看 ROUGE。</p>
<p>因为 ROUGE 高的摘要可能只是复制原文，但不一定简洁；</p>
<p>ROUGE 低的摘要也可能语义很好。</p>
<p>对于 LLM 摘要，更重要的是：</p>
<ul>
<li>是否覆盖关键信息</li>
<li>是否压缩得当</li>
<li>是否没有幻觉</li>
<li>是否没有改变原文事实</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="机器翻译指标" class="heading-element"><span>机器翻译指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9c%ba%e5%99%a8%e7%bf%bb%e8%af%91%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>BLEU</td>
 <td>和参考译文的 n-gram 重合</td>
 <td>传统机器翻译</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>COMET</td>
 <td>基于神经网络的翻译质量评价</td>
 <td>现代翻译系统</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>chrF</td>
 <td>字符级相似度</td>
 <td>多语言翻译</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Human Evaluation</td>
 <td>人工判断准确性、流畅性、忠实度</td>
 <td>高质量翻译评估</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>翻译任务里 BLEU 很经典，但现在 COMET、人工评价更能反映真实质量。</p>
<h3 id="检索与-rag-指标" class="heading-element"><span>检索与 RAG 指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e7%b4%a2%e4%b8%8e-rag-%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>RAG 系统通常分两部分评估：检索质量和生成质量。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>检索部分</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Recall@k</td>
 <td>前 k 个检索结果是否覆盖相关文档</td>
 <td>RAG 检索器</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Precision@k</td>
 <td>前 k 个结果中有多少是真相关</td>
 <td>检索质量</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>MRR</td>
 <td>正确结果排得越靠前分越高</td>
 <td>问答检索、搜索</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>nDCG</td>
 <td>考虑排序位置和相关性等级</td>
 <td>搜索引擎、推荐系统</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Hit@k</td>
 <td>前 k 个结果中是否命中正确文档</td>
 <td>粗略检索评估</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
</li>
<li>
<p>生成部分</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Faithfulness</td>
 <td>回答是否被上下文支持</td>
 <td>RAG 防幻觉</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Answer Relevancy</td>
 <td>回答是否针对问题</td>
 <td>RAG QA</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Context Precision</td>
 <td>检索上下文里有多少有用内容</td>
 <td>RAG 检索质量</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Context Recall</td>
 <td>必要证据是否都被检索到</td>
 <td>多文档问答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Citation Accuracy</td>
 <td>引用是否支持对应说法</td>
 <td>带引用的 RAG 系统</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="推理与数学指标" class="heading-element"><span>推理与数学指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8e%a8%e7%90%86%e4%b8%8e%e6%95%b0%e5%ad%a6%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Final Answer Accuracy</td>
 <td>最终答案是否正确</td>
 <td>GSM8K、MATH、AIME 类任务</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Step Accuracy</td>
 <td>推理步骤是否正确</td>
 <td>数学推导、逻辑题</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Pass Rate</td>
 <td>一组题目中答对比例</td>
 <td>Benchmark 测试</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Consistency</td>
 <td>多次采样答案是否一致</td>
 <td>推理稳定性</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Majority Vote Accuracy</td>
 <td>多次生成后投票答案是否正确</td>
 <td>self-consistency 推理</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>数学和推理任务不能只看表达流畅度，重点是最终答案和推理链是否可靠。</p>
<h3 id="代码生成指标" class="heading-element"><span>代码生成指标</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%a3%e7%a0%81%e7%94%9f%e6%88%90%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>pass@1</td>
 <td>生成一次代码，能否通过测试</td>
 <td>HumanEval、MBPP</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>pass@k</td>
 <td>生成 k 个候选，只要一个通过就算成功</td>
 <td>代码模型评估</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Compilation Rate</td>
 <td>是否能编译/运行</td>
 <td>编程语言任务</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Test Pass Rate</td>
 <td>单元测试通过比例</td>
 <td>真实代码任务</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>CodeBLEU</td>
 <td>结合代码结构和文本相似度</td>
 <td>代码翻译、代码补全</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>代码任务最重要的通常是能不能运行、能不能过测试</p>
<h3 id="对话与人类偏好指标" class="heading-element"><span>对话与人类偏好指标</span>
 <a href="#%e5%af%b9%e8%af%9d%e4%b8%8e%e4%ba%ba%e7%b1%bb%e5%81%8f%e5%a5%bd%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Win Rate</td>
 <td>A/B 两个模型，人类或评审更喜欢哪个</td>
 <td>聊天模型、助手模型</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Elo Rating</td>
 <td>根据对战胜负计算模型等级</td>
 <td>Chatbot Arena 类评测</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Helpfulness</td>
 <td>回答是否有帮助</td>
 <td>通用助手</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Harmlessness</td>
 <td>是否安全、无害</td>
 <td>对齐评估</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Honesty</td>
 <td>不知道时是否承认不知道</td>
 <td>可信助手</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Instruction Following</td>
 <td>是否严格遵循指令</td>
 <td>通用 LLM 评估</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>开放式对话很难用单一标准答案评价，所以经常用人类偏好或 LLM-as-Judge。</p>
<p>不过 LLM-as-Judge 也有偏差，比如偏好长回答、格式漂亮的回答，或者偏向某些模型风格。</p>
<h3 id="安全与对齐指标" class="heading-element"><span>安全与对齐指标</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ae%89%e5%85%a8%e4%b8%8e%e5%af%b9%e9%bd%90%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Toxicity Rate</td>
 <td>是否生成攻击性、有害内容</td>
 <td>安全评估</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Bias Score</td>
 <td>是否存在性别、种族、地域等偏见</td>
 <td>公平性测试</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Refusal Accuracy</td>
 <td>对有害请求是否拒答</td>
 <td>安全对齐</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Over-refusal Rate</td>
 <td>对正常请求是否误拒</td>
 <td>可用性评估</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Jailbreak ASR</td>
 <td>Attack Success Rate，越狱攻击成功率</td>
 <td>红队测试</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Hallucination Rate</td>
 <td>幻觉比例</td>
 <td>知识问答、RAG、摘要</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>安全评估要同时看两个方向：</p>
<ul>
<li>该拒绝时能不能拒绝</li>
<li>不该拒绝时会不会乱拒绝</li>
</ul>
<p>一个模型如果什么都拒绝，安全分可能高，但可用性很差。</p>
<h3 id="事实性与幻觉指标" class="heading-element"><span>事实性与幻觉指标</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8b%e5%ae%9e%e6%80%a7%e4%b8%8e%e5%b9%bb%e8%a7%89%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Factual Accuracy</td>
 <td>事实是否正确</td>
 <td>知识问答、报告生成</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Hallucination Rate</td>
 <td>生成内容中 unsupported 或错误内容比例</td>
 <td>长文本生成、RAG</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Attribution Score</td>
 <td>回答是否有可靠来源支撑</td>
 <td>带引用问答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Faithfulness</td>
 <td>输出是否忠于输入材料</td>
 <td>摘要、文档问答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Claim Verification</td>
 <td>将回答拆成声明逐条验证</td>
 <td>高可信生成</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>对于论文总结、医疗、法律、金融、RAG 系统，事实性比语言流畅度更重要。</p>
<h3 id="工具调用--agent-指标" class="heading-element"><span>工具调用 / Agent 指标</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b7%a5%e5%85%b7%e8%b0%83%e7%94%a8--agent-%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Tool Call Accuracy</td>
 <td>是否选择了正确工具</td>
 <td>Agent、函数调用</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Argument Accuracy</td>
 <td>工具参数是否正确</td>
 <td>function calling</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Task Success Rate</td>
 <td>最终任务是否完成</td>
 <td>Agent 系统</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Step Efficiency</td>
 <td>完成任务用了多少步</td>
 <td>多步工具调用</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Recovery Rate</td>
 <td>出错后能否自我修正</td>
 <td>自动化 Agent</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>让模型查天气、写文件、调用数据库、执行代码时，评价重点不只是回答文本，而是任务有没有真的完成。</p>
<h3 id="校准与不确定性指标" class="heading-element"><span>校准与不确定性指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a0%a1%e5%87%86%e4%b8%8e%e4%b8%8d%e7%a1%ae%e5%ae%9a%e6%80%a7%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Calibration</td>
 <td>模型自信程度是否和正确率匹配</td>
 <td>高风险问答</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>ECE</td>
 <td>Expected Calibration Error，校准误差</td>
 <td>概率预测</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Brier Score</td>
 <td>预测概率和真实结果的差距</td>
 <td>分类、风险预测</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Abstention Rate</td>
 <td>不确定时选择不回答的比例</td>
 <td>医疗、法律、金融</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>理想模型应该是：知道自己什么时候不知道。</p>
<h3 id="效率指标" class="heading-element"><span>效率指标</span>
 <a href="#%e6%95%88%e7%8e%87%e6%8c%87%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th>指标</th>
 <th>含义</th>
 <th>适用场景</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td>Latency</td>
 <td>响应延迟</td>
 <td>在线应用</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Throughput</td>
 <td>单位时间处理多少请求/token</td>
 <td>服务部署</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Tokens/s</td>
 <td>每秒生成 token 数</td>
 <td>推理速度</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Cost per 1K/1M tokens</td>
 <td>调用成本</td>
 <td>商业部署</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Memory Usage</td>
 <td>显存/内存占用</td>
 <td>本地部署</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td>Context Length</td>
 <td>可处理上下文长度</td>
 <td>长文档任务</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>

item.title: 论文 · LightRAG：Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="基础信息" class="heading-element"><span>基础信息</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e4%bf%a1%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>论文标题：LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation</li>
<li>作者：Zirui Guo, Lianghao Xia, Yanhua Yu, Tu Ao, Chao Huang</li>
<li>版本信息：arXiv:2410.05779v3，2025-04-28</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>核心贡献</strong>：LightRAG 通过图结构文本索引、低层实体检索与高层主题检索相结合的双层检索，以及增量更新机制，在保持较低检索成本的同时提升复杂语义查询下的 RAG 回答质量。</p>
<h2 id="q1-研究动机" class="heading-element"><span>Q1. 研究动机</span>
 <a href="#q1-%e7%a0%94%e7%a9%b6%e5%8a%a8%e6%9c%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>传统 RAG 常把文档切成扁平 chunk，再做向量相似度检索。这种方式适合局部事实查询，但难以建模实体之间的关系和跨文档依赖，容易生成碎片化回答。GraphRAG 虽能利用图结构获取全局信息，但成本高、更新慢。作者希望构建一种既能捕捉实体关系，又能快速检索和增量更新的轻量图增强 RAG。</p>
<h2 id="q2-核心问题" class="heading-element"><span>Q2. 核心问题</span>
 <a href="#q2-%e6%a0%b8%e5%bf%83%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>本文要解决的问题是：如何在不承担 GraphRAG 高昂图遍历和社区报告成本的前提下，把图结构带来的全局语义理解能力引入 RAG。</p>
<p>更具体地说，LightRAG 面向三个技术挑战：更全面的信息检索、更高效低成本的图上检索，以及对新增数据的快速适应。</p>
<h2 id="q3-现有不足--本文改进" class="heading-element"><span>Q3. 现有不足 &amp; 本文改进</span>
 <a href="#q3-%e7%8e%b0%e6%9c%89%e4%b8%8d%e8%b6%b3--%e6%9c%ac%e6%96%87%e6%94%b9%e8%bf%9b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>现有方法的不足：</p>
<ul>
<li>Naive RAG 依赖扁平 chunk 和向量匹配，难以理解实体之间的复杂关系。</li>
<li>RQ-RAG、HyDE 可以改写或扩展查询，但仍主要围绕 chunk 检索，缺少结构化全局知识。</li>
<li>GraphRAG 使用图和社区摘要处理高层查询，但检索时需要遍历社区报告，token 和 API 调用成本高。</li>
<li>传统索引在知识库变化时常需要重新处理较大范围数据，动态更新成本较高。</li>
</ul>
<p>本文改进点：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>用 LLM 从文本 chunk 中抽取实体和关系，构建知识图。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">原始文档
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">-&gt; 分块 chunking
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">-&gt; 存入 full_docs / text_chunks
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">-&gt; 后续进入实体关系抽取</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">KV：存原文、chunks、缓存
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Vector：存 embedding，用于相似度检索
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Graph：存实体和关系
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">DocStatus：记录文档处理状态</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>上传材料后有三套索引：</p>
<ul>
<li>文本块索引</li>
<li>向量索引</li>
<li>知识图谱索引</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>为实体和关系生成 key-value 索引：key 用于快速匹配，value 是可供生成使用的文本描述。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>设计 dual-level retrieval：低层检索关注具体实体和边，高层检索关注全局主题和关系。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>将图结构和向量表示结合，先抽取 query 的 low-level/high-level keywords，再匹配实体与关系。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>新数据到来时只对新增文档执行同样的图索引流程，再与原节点和边合并，避免重建全库索引。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="q4-方法流程" class="heading-element"><span>Q4. 方法流程</span>
 <a href="#q4-%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>LightRAG 的输入是外部文档库和用户 query。</p>
<p>索引阶段，系统先把文档切成 chunk，再用 LLM 抽取实体、关系和上下文片段，形成节点和边。</p>
<p>从chunk抽实体和关系：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-zed" data-lang="zed"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err">对每个</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">调</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">LLM</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">抽取实体</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">entity</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">抽取实体之间的关系</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">relation</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">合并重复实体</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">合并重复关系</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">写入</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">graph</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">storage</span><span class="w">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="w"></span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">同时把</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">entity</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">/</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">relation</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="err">放进</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">vector</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">DBs</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>随后，LLM profiling 为每个实体和关系生成可检索的 key-value 表示，并通过去重合并跨 chunk 的重复实体和关系，得到用于检索的知识图。</p>
<p>检索阶段，系统从 query 中抽取两类关键词：low-level keywords 用来匹配具体实体，high-level keywords 用来匹配更抽象的关系或主题。</p>
<p>检索流程：</p>
<p>一般RAG：query -&gt; embedding -&gt; 找相似 chunks -&gt; 塞给 LLM</p>
<p>LightRAG：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">query -&gt; 找相关实体
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">query -&gt; 找相关关系
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">query -&gt; 找相关文本块
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">query -&gt; 合并上下文
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">query -&gt; LLM 生成答案</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>检索到图元素后，LightRAG 进一步收集一跳邻居，把局部实体、关系和相关原文片段组织成上下文。</p>
<p>生成阶段，通用 LLM 将用户 query 与这些结构化检索结果拼接后生成答案。若知识库新增文档，LightRAG 只为新增文档构图并与原图合并。</p>
<p>LightRAG的回答来源：图谱召回 + chunk 召回 + LLM 综合生成</p>
<p>其中参数控制：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">KG Top K：取多少实体/关系候选
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Chunk Top K：取多少原文片段
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Max Entity Tokens：实体上下文最多多长
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Max Relation Tokens：关系上下文最多多长
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Max Total Tokens：总上下文上限</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="代码对应流程" class="heading-element"><span>代码对应流程</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%a3%e7%a0%81%e5%af%b9%e5%ba%94%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>

</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
